_meta.first_load_js_routes: Per-route First Load JS in KB; +10% over baseline triggers CI failure (T13.87).
_meta.regen_command: cd frontend && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:8000 npm run build, then copy the printed table into this file.
_meta.notes: Regenerated 2026-04-30 post sprint/narrative-reset souji-sweep. Home route grew 153 -> 170 kB (+17 kB, accepted) from Ch04-enrich (Mapbox waypoint markers, barrier annotations, SVG overlay, compass, stat row, attribution chip, legend rebuild, film grain) + brand-parity sweep (shadcn HSL palette rebrand cascading across every subpage). Subpages grew ~3-4 kB each from the same brand-parity chain landing in the shared chunk. New routes added by polish-2: /api/now (live-ts endpoint), /jobs/rss.xml (jobs feed). Two utility routes (/robots.txt, /sitemap.xml) and /_not-found are preserved at their prior baseline since Next 15 reports them as static and the build output omits the First Load JS column for them.
